mapper.insert: insert into fin_holding_snapshot( family_id, member_id, account_id, asset_id, snapshot_date, quote_time, holding_qty, cost_amount, market_value, floating_profit_amount, realized_profit_amount, profit_amount, profit_rate, position_ratio, create_time ) values ( #{familyId}, #{memberId}, #{accountId}, #{assetId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{quoteTime}, #{holdingQty}, #{costAmount}, #{marketValue}, #{floatingProfitAmount}, #{realizedProfitAmount}, #{profitAmount}, #{profitRate}, #{positionRatio}, sysdate() )
